subcodes.first_line: O Lord! Make them that are righteous drunk with the wine of mysteries and make them dawning-points of the lights of guidance [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یاران عزیز عبدالبهاء چندی بود که کشور قفقاز را فساد و فتنه مستولی بود لهذا
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for unity, @spiritual transformation, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @being a source of light; guidance, @call to action
